standard_measures.measurement: 240ml, or approximately 4.5 inches tall, 3 inch diameter at top, 2 inch diameter at bottom
200-300g allowed per day
100-120g cooked, or 40g raw; serve in a bowl approximately 2 inch height, 3 inch diameter
Should always be thin and the size of a CD; approximately 30g raw flour, or palm-sized
3-4 tbsp flour per roti; if using a flour combination, use 2 tbsp of each flour
40g raw, or half of a 100ml tea glass
Approximately 40g
Up to 60-100g per day, whenever mentioned in the meal plan
60-80g soaked poha for a single recipe serving
60-80g for upma; 40g specifically referenced in Week 11 beetroot semiya upma
1 cup peanuts + 1 tbsp oil, makes one jar, stores up to 1 month refrigerated
1 cup green gram + 1/4 cup rice, soaked 5 hours to overnight
1 tbsp chia seeds soaked in 250ml water for 30 minutes (BASIC_HEALTHY_DIET guide); some weekly plans use 1 tsp per 250ml instead
2 tbsp chia seeds soaked in milk/coconut milk/beetroot juice for 1 hour
30g raw, soaked 6-7 hours, pressure cooked 2 whistles
60-100g boiled portion depending on the week
100-120g boiled portion
100g boiled portion (Week 4 breakfast); 40g boiled for dinner-style sauté (Week 11)
100-120g boiled, more in carrot-week variant with extra grated carrot
30g raw, soaked 5-6 hours then boiled until mashable
60ml milk with a pinch of nutmeg
Approximately 100ml milk with a pinch of turmeric
1-inch crushed ginger boiled in 250ml water for a few minutes
1 tbsp methi seeds soaked overnight in 250ml water
1 tbsp each, boiled in water, filtered, served warm
4-5 tulsi leaves + 1 inch cinnamon stick in 250ml water, infused overnight
250ml lukewarm water with half a lemon
5 cubes paneer (~50-80g) per serving with 2 tbsp besan marinade
500ml water + vegetables of choice, blended and re-tempered with 1 tbsp oil
60-80g, following the same method as Semiya Upma
1 cup semiya to 1 cup water

water_intake.amount: Rest as per convenience - minimum 3 litres total per day

diet_variation_substitution_rules.rule: For more variety, rice quantity can be replaced with an equal quantity of millets, quinoa, or couscous.
Roti quantities can be replaced with bread, cheela, or dosa in equivalent portions.
Flour combinations should always be mixed in a 1:1 ratio when a recipe calls for two flours.
Missi roti can be replaced with bran roti.

permitted_food_categories.notes: Reduce consumption of potato, yam, and tapioca within these categories.
